# Driveway Gates Surrey

> Surrey's driveway gate installer matching service. We connect homeowners across Surrey with vetted, experienced gate installers, including specialists in gated-estate access control and Surrey Hills AONB design.

## About

Driveway Gates Surrey is a free matching service that connects Surrey homeowners with vetted gate installers. Every installer in our network is a gate specialist with a verified project history (50+ completed residential installations), carries public liability cover, and provides written warranties on both the gate and the automation. Homeowners pay nothing to use the service. Installers pay a referral fee only when a job goes ahead.

## Services

- Electric Sliding Gates: /services/electric-sliding-gates/
- Electric Swing Gates: /services/electric-swing-gates/
- Wooden Driveway Gates: /services/wooden-driveway-gates/
- Metal Driveway Gates: /services/metal-driveway-gates/
- Automated Gate Systems: /services/automated-gate-systems/
- Gate Repair and Maintenance: /services/gate-repair-and-maintenance/

## Coverage

We cover all of Surrey, including the prestige estate belt of North Surrey (Weybridge, Cobham, Esher, Oxshott, and the St George's Hill and Wentworth estates), the western towns (Guildford, Woking, Farnham, Haslemere), and the Surrey Hills Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty around Dorking, Leatherhead, and the North Downs. We have particular expertise in ANPR and video-intercom access control for gated estates and in AONB-sensitive gate design.

- Location pages: /location/

## Key Facts

- Service area: the county of Surrey
- Installer vetting: gate specialists with a verified project history (50+ completed installations)
- Insurance: public liability cover and written warranties required from every installer
- Estate specialism: ANPR, video intercom, and CCTV-integrated access control for gated estates; underground motors for a concealed finish
- Typical installation: 2 to 4 working days
- Finance: 0% interest-free options available
- Free site surveys with no obligation
